---
title: "Interactions médicamenteuses"
---

### Clin. Pharm. SoM {#clinicalph .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://drug-interactions.medicine.iu.edu/main-table" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/clinicalpharmacologyschool.png" alt="Clin. Pharm. SoM">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://drug-interactions.medicine.iu.edu/main-table" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Clinical Pharmacology — School of Medicine</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Indiana University School of Medicine
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### DDI Predictor {#ddi-predictor .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.ddi-predictor.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/ddi_predictor.png" alt="DDI Predictor">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.ddi-predictor.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">DDI Predictor</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Université de Lausanne
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### SuperCYPsPred {#supercypspred .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://insilico-cyp.charite.de/SuperCYPsPred/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/supercypspred.png" alt="SuperCYPsPred">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://insilico-cyp.charite.de/SuperCYPsPred/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SuperCYPsPred</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Charité – Universitätsmedizin Berlin
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Thésaurus ANSM {#thésaurus-ansm .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://ansm.sante.fr/documents/reference/thesaurus-des-interactions-medicamenteuses-1" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/ansm.png" alt="Thésaurus ANSM">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://ansm.sante.fr/documents/reference/thesaurus-des-interactions-medicamenteuses-1" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Thésaurus des interactions médicamenteuses</a>
<div class="outil-source">
ANSM
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Drugs.com {#drugs .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.drugs.com/drug_interactions.html" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/drugs.png" alt="Drugs.com">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.drugs.com/drug_interactions.html" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Drugs.com — Drug Interactions Checker</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Drugs.com
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### COVID Drug Interactions {#covid-drug-interactions .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.covid19-druginteractions.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/covidliverpool.png" alt="COVID Drug Interactions">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.covid19-druginteractions.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">COVID-19 Drug Interactions</a>
<div class="outil-source">
University of Liverpool
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### HEP Drug Interactions {#hep-drug-interactions .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.hep-druginteractions.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/hepliverpool.png" alt="HEP Drug Interactions">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.hep-druginteractions.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">HEP Drug Interactions</a>
<div class="outil-source">
University of Liverpool
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### HIV Drug Interactions {#hiv-drug-interactions .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.hiv-druginteractions.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/hivliverpool.png" alt="HIV Drug Interactions">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.hiv-druginteractions.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">HIV Drug Interactions</a>
<div class="outil-source">
University of Liverpool
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Recos Paxlovid SFPT {#recos-paxlovid-sfpt .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://sfpt-fr.org/recospaxlovid" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfpt.png" alt="Recos Paxlovid SFPT">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://sfpt-fr.org/recospaxlovid" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Recommandations Paxlovid — SFPT</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Française de Pharmacologie et Thérapeutique
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Cancer Drug Interactions {#oncologie .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.cancer-druginteractions.org/checker" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/cancerliverpool.png" alt="Cancer Drug Interactions">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.cancer-druginteractions.org/checker" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Cancer Drug Interactions</a>
<div class="outil-source">
University of Liverpool
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### Hedrine {#hedrine .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://hedrine.ulb.be/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/hedrine.png" alt="Hedrine">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://hedrine.ulb.be/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Hedrine</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Université Libre de Bruxelles
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### MSKCC Herbs {#mskcc-herbs .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.mskcc.org/cancer-care/diagnosis-treatment/symptom-management/integrative-medicine/herbs/search" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/mskcc.png" alt="MSKCC Herbs">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.mskcc.org/cancer-care/diagnosis-treatment/symptom-management/integrative-medicine/herbs/search" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">About Herbs — MSKCC</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

### NatMed {#natmed .outil-heading}
```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://naturalmedicines.therapeuticresearch.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/natmed.png" alt="NatMed">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://naturalmedicines.therapeuticresearch.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Natural Medicines</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Therapeutic Research Center
<br><span style="color: #E07B00;">Accès payant</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
